GeneralDescription.SourceString: Proudly following in his father's pawprints.
GeneralDescription.LocalizedString: Proudly following in his father's pawprints.

AdditionalDescription.SourceString: Kit's a genius at building mechs and fighting evil. So why not add therapist to his resume? He'll get Meowscles and Lynx to reconnect, if he has to put them in time out to do it.
AdditionalDescription.LocalizedString: Kit's a genius at building mechs and fighting evil. So why not add therapist to his resume? He'll get Meowscles and Lynx to reconnect, if he has to put them in time out to do it.
